title: Status change - update in a connected board (number)

posts.author: kristina (Kristina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would like to connect two separate boards - Project Review and Weekly Tracker. If the status in Project Review changes, I’d like the numbers in Weekly Tracker to update itself automatically.

Example: 3 projects changed from Production to Completed. The number of the Completed projects in the Weekly tracker sets to 3.

Is this even possible?
Thanks.
